events.description: Policy 56. Use of rooms or other facilities of the Hiram Price Dillon House adopted
Policy 57. Disposition of Donations, Gifts and Bequests adopted
Policy 58. Dillon House Advisory Commission adopted
Policy 60. Paid parental leave for legislative employees adopted
Policy 60. Paid parental leave for legislative employees amended

evidence.quote: The use of state postage in the mailing of personal correspondence is a misdemeanor. K.S.A. 21-6006 states in part: It shall be unlawful for any person to use for such person's personal use, or to allow any unauthorized person to use, any form of postage knowing such postage to have been paid for with state funds.

The CRC shall be staffed by the Capitol architect, the director of the division of facilities management, or a designee of the director, the division of legislative administrative services, the legislative research department and such other persons as the Legislative Coordinating Council may specify.
If the accepted donation, gift or bequest is for a specified purpose, it shall be expended for the purpose specified.
evidence.note: Policy 57. Disposition of Donations, Gifts and Bequests, subsection (c)

evidence.quote: All employees of the Legislative branch in a benefits-eligible, full time position shall be eligible to receive paid parental leave following the birth or adoption of a child that occurs on or after August 5, 2021.
evidence.note: Policy 60. Paid parental leave for legislative employees, subsection (a)
